task_completion.description: Justify all body text (excluding the title).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Home tab, the 'Justify' alignment button is highlighted when body text is selected, and the body paragraphs have straight, even left and right margins.
In the Page Layout tab, the Hyphenation menu shows 'Automatic' is checked, or hyphens are visibly automatically inserted at the ends of lines in the document text.

task_completion.description: Set consecutive hyphen limit to exactly 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hyphenation' dialog box is open, showing 'Limit consecutive hyphens to:' set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Keep lines together' to the paragraph starting with 'Risk management is the ongoing process...'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Paragraph dialog box (Line and Page Breaks tab) shows 'Keep lines together' checked, with the target paragraph ('Risk management is the ongoing process...') selected or visible behind the dialog.

task_completion.description: Save the document as 'NIST_Report_Final.docx' in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Word window title bar displays 'NIST_Report_Final.docx', or a Save As dialog shows the file being saved in the Documents folder with this name.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Microsoft Word 2010 GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Microsoft Word 2010 ribbons, dialogs, and menus, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually selected text and opened dialog boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text selection, cursor placement, and Word dialog boxes (like Paragraph or Hyphenation) being opened and modified.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use Python or PowerShell scripts to modify the docx file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are used to manipulate the .docx file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target paragraph starts with 'Risk management is the ongoing process'. The hyphenation limit must be exactly 2. The expected output file is 'NIST_Report_Final.docx' saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
